task_title: Migrate pending orders to paid with checkpoints

scores.justification: The agent never performed reconciliation logic; it recorded before counts (pending: 18, paid: 35) but never compared them to after counts or calculated the delta, and the pipeline did not actually change any order statuses.

The agent never stated whether counts reconciled or whether a rollback was executed; it ran out of turns (max_turns=32) while still investigating the pipeline and never provided a final reconciliation report.
